dest_station_id: Phase 3: POHC↔CSX through traffic — no Neville Island spotting. Cars load/unload at Offline party codes on the interchange yards, same naming as island locals.
POHC→CSX (RouteChain POHC): load SCL-IN-{party} @ Scully → unload DEM-OUT-{party} @ Demmler. dest_station_id=14 (Mckeesport PA) for pickup criteria.
CSX→POHC (RouteChain CSX): load DEM-IN-{party} @ Demmler → unload SCL-OUT-{party} @ Scully. dest_station_id=15 (McKees Rock PA) for pickup criteria.
Reuse existing Offline codes from Phases 1–2 when the same party appears on the correct side; add new codes only for IX-only parties or opposite-side reuse.
